baseline.scenario: failing-first proof that canonical skeleton routes lacked the shared ListingWorkspaceShell/header/tabs before T6 edits
baseline.invocation: omo sparkshell --shell 'rg -n "ListingWorkspaceShell|Listings /|Knowledge|Documents|primary next action|aria-current" frontend/src/app/\(app\)/listings frontend/src/components/listings || true' --budget 30000
baseline.result: exit 0; no ListingWorkspaceShell, breadcrumb, primary next action, or aria-current matches. Matches were only pre-existing document state in FinishedListingFlow and skeleton route names for knowledge/documents.
baseline.observable: baseline output did not contain ListingWorkspaceShell or aria-current under canonical listing workspace files

implementation.scenario: shared route shell for every canonical /listings/[id] subroute
implementation.observable: frontend/src/app/(app)/listings/[id]/layout.tsx wraps children with <ListingWorkspaceShell id={id}>; Next layout inheritance covers page.tsx, knowledge/page.tsx, logistics/page.tsx, offers/page.tsx, and documents/page.tsx.

verification.scenario: TypeScript validates the new shell and route layout
Static route-backed shell QA proves canonical tabs and shell markers exist
verification.result: exit 0; output includes ListingWorkspaceShell import/use in [id]/layout.tsx, five canonical tab hrefs in ListingWorkspaceShell.tsx, breadcrumb aria-label source with Listings /, and aria-current on active tab. Output also includes pre-existing FinishedListingFlow document references outside T6 scope.

verification.scenario: Whitespace and conflict marker check across T6-scoped files plus evidence
Next generated route types refreshed after adding a new dynamic layout
verification.result: exit 0; output: Generating route types... / Types generated successfully

scenarios.scenario: Every canonical subroute inherits the same shell
scenarios.result: output lists documents/page.tsx, knowledge/page.tsx, layout.tsx, logistics/page.tsx, offers/page.tsx, and page.tsx under frontend/src/app/(app)/listings/[id].

scenarios.scenario: Tabs link only to canonical /listings/<id> routes
scenarios.result: WORKSPACE_TABS hrefs are /listings/${id}, /knowledge, /logistics, /offers, and /documents; no /dashboard/listings href was introduced.

scenarios.scenario: Malformed or partial listing fields do not crash shell rendering
scenarios.invocation: source inspection of listingTitle, priceLabel, communityLabel, propertyTypeLabel, listingIdFromParams
scenarios.result: all required shell fields have Unknown/Unassigned/not-set fallbacks and layout params are parsed from unknown without assertions.

manual_qa.browser_qa: not run; no dev server was running and T6 acceptance allows static route shell mapping plus tsc

post_implementation_review.visual_qa_skill: read; no browser capture run because T6 explicitly accepts static route-backed shell QA when no dev server/browser is already available and cleanup scope says no servers/processes.
post_implementation_review.review_work_skill: read; five-subagent orchestration not run because the available multi_agent_v1.spawn_agent tool states not to spawn sub-agents unless the user explicitly asks for sub-agents, delegation, or parallel agent work.
post_implementation_review.main_agent_review_result: PASS based on final tsc, static route mapping grep, source inspection, JSON parse, diff --check, and scoped dirty-worktree review.

dirty_worktree.pre_status: pre-existing dirty/untracked files included frontend/src/app/(app)/listings/page.tsx, frontend/src/components/listings/FinishedListingFlow.tsx, frontend/src/lib/queries.ts, frontend/src/app/(app)/listings/[id]/ skeleton routes, AgentListingsIndex.tsx, and AgentListingsTable.tsx.
dirty_worktree.post_status: T6 added frontend/src/components/listings/ListingWorkspaceShell.tsx and frontend/src/app/(app)/listings/[id]/layout.tsx; existing dirty files were not reverted.

stale_state.result: reran shell grep after edits; Next route type metadata refreshed with next typegen before final tsc.

misleading_success_output.result: inspected layout and WORKSPACE_TABS source instead of relying only on grep exit code.

generated_or_cached_artifacts.result: Next generated route types were regenerated with npx --no-install next typegen after adding frontend/src/app/(app)/listings/[id]/layout.tsx; no generated files were intentionally staged or edited manually.

malformed_input.result: shell uses fallbacks for missing listing title, agent, price, community, type, detail status, and unknown route params.

risks: Header data is limited by existing useListingDetail plus useAgentListings responses; if T3/T5 response fields change, labels still fall back but some health badges may be conservative.
Browser screenshot QA was not run because no dev server was already available; T6 accepted static route shell mapping plus tsc as the observable.
The required grep includes pre-existing FinishedListingFlow document matches outside T6 scope.
